Deutsche Telekom AG is considering taking full control of T-Mobile US Inc. in a move that could create a $260 billion transatlantic telecoms giant. It’s easy to see why the German suitor wants to go from being T-Mobile’s lead shareholder to its outright owner. The benefits for T-Mobile are less obvious — until you consider its future without a deal.

summary: Sadiq Khan is about to complete 10 years as London’s mayor. He’s seen the city affected by Brexit, the pandemic and two energy crises. That hasn’t deterred him from deploying some of the strongest air-quality regulations in any city. But he hasn’t yet succeeded in getting enough homes built and struggled to keep improving the train network. As cities keep growing, Khan talks to Akshat Rathi about lessons from London’s successes and failures. As a prominent member of the UK’s Labour Party, Khan a

Dr. Jakob Thomae, co-founder and CEO of Theia Finance Labs, argues for the motion, while Dr. Ben Caldecott, founding director of the Oxford Sustainable Finance Group and a coordinating lead author on finance for the IPCC’s Seventh Assessment Report, argues against it. summary: Oil inched higher as attempts to resolve the seven-week conflict between the US and Iran struggled, and Iranian gunboats opened fire on vessels near the critical Strait of Hormuz waterway.

title: Oil Servicer Weatherford Sees War Impacts Deepening This Quarter

title: Emerging Currencies Waver as Conflict Drags On, Oil Prices Rise
title_cn: 冲突持续、油价上涨，新兴货币波动

title: S&P 500 Hovers Near Its All-Time High; Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap

summary: A slew of strong corporate profits lifted stocks a day after President Donald Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran, though attempts to resolve the conflict struggled without any signs that the key Strait of Hormuz will reopen soon. Oil climbed.

summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. Chief Executive Officer Scott Kirby sidestepped questions about a potential merger with American Airlines Group Inc. while acknowledging that the current climate of high costs and struggling rivals might offer opportunities for deals.

title: S&P Global Vice Chairman: Hormuz Crisis Is Driving Global Change
title_cn: 标普全球副主席：霍尔木兹危机正在推动全球变革
summary:
Consumers are already feeling the effects of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz with energy prices surging around the world. But what if the crisis is signaling a longer-term global power shift?

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, S&P Global Vice Chairman Daniel Yergin tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway that a "different world" will emerge, regardless of the war's ultimate outcome. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone Credit Fund Looks to Raise at Least $500 Million
title_cn: Blackstone 信贷基金预计筹集至少 5 亿美元
summary: Blackstone Private Credit Fund is seeking to raise at least $500 million from an investment-grade note sale, people with direct knowledge of the matter said, as private lenders known as business development companies ramp up debt issuance after a dry spell.

title: Oil Traders Say Billion-Barrel Hole Will Linger Long After War
title_cn: 石油交易商表示，数十亿桶的石油洞将在战后长期存在
summary: The impact of the Iran war will continue for months even after any deal to restore shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, the world’s largest oil traders have warned. Some said flows through the waterway may never return to normal. Speaking at the FT Commodities Global Summit in Lausanne, executives at some of the world’s largest oil traders warned that the rewiring of the oil market would take months even if a peace deal is agreed soon. The market is not fully reflecting the impact of the massive supply disruption, they said, cautioning that prices will need to ratchet higher to the point of pushing the global economy toward a recession if the conflict continues. Samantha Dart, Goldman Sachs Co-Head of Global Commodities Research, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. She speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Gain as Trump Truce Extension, Earnings Lift Spirits
title_cn: 特朗普延长休战协议美股上涨，盈利提振
summary: US stocks advanced on Wednesday as traders examined the state of play for the Middle East following President Donald Trump’s ceasefire extension with Iran and cheered corporate earnings.

summary: Gold regained some ground after a two-day decline, as US President Donald Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran and allowed more time to arrange fresh peace talks.

title: A Private Equity Reset

summary: Private equity is entering a new era according to Mark Sotir, the President of  Equity Group Investments, He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down why founders are rushing for stability, how AI is boosting productivity, not replacing jobs, and why rising interest rates and competition are making it harder than ever to generate returns. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Avis Surge Crushes Short Sellers
title_cn: 安飞士股价飙升压垮卖空者
summary: Avis shares tripled in two weeks, crushing short sellers with $2.5 billion in losses. But bears are doubling down—short interest now near a decade high at 58%. Analysts question the rally’s fundamentals, warning the surge looks like a short squeeze, not real growth. Bloomberg's Jordan Fitzgerald joined Bloomberg Open Interest with details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 由于船只遭到枪击，霍尔木兹交通几乎停止
summary: The Strait of Hormuz stayed at a near standstill Wednesday as Iranian forces opened fire on — and seized — commercial ships.

summary: A Petrobras board member appointed by non-controlling shareholders is warning that the state-controlled producer is losing billions from below-market fuel sales and risks reputational damage.

summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: UK power generation from fossil fuels fell to the lowest level since records started in 2009, highlighting the country’s rapid shift toward renewable energy.

title: Junk Bond Investors Are Squeezing Companies for Better Terms
title_cn: 垃圾债券投资者正在向公司施压以获得更好的条件
summary: Investors are seizing what may be a fleeting opportunity to negotiate better terms when buying high-yield debt, turning the tables on borrowers for the first time in years.

title: Ping Pong Robot Uses Agentic AI
title_cn: 乒乓球机器人使用 Agentic AI
summary: Scientists at Sony AI have developed a table tennis robot with enough speed and precision to beat even some expert ping pong players in the latest matchup between biological and artificial intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AT&T Results Seen Mixed as Wireless Service Revenue Disappoints
title_cn: AT&T 无线服务收入令人失望，业绩好坏参半
summary: AT&T Inc. gave a mixed first-quarter earnings report, with wireless service revenue coming up short, tempering better-than-expected overall sales and profit.

title: Adobe Expands Agentic AI Ecosystem With Big Tech Partners
title_cn: Adobe 与大型科技合作伙伴扩展 Agentic AI 生态系统
summary: Adobe is launching a new agentic platform targeting business-to-business and consumers that, in addition to working closely with model providers OpenAI and Anthropic, can ease concern about disruption to its business. The company is partnering with tech giants Amazon, Anthropic, Google, Nvidia, OpenAI, and more to build what it calls the broadest agentic AI ecosystem in the industry. Anil Chakravarthy, Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Business President, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily from the Adobe Summit 2026 in Las Vegas to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Bets CEO Ternus Will Bring Back Jobs-Era Decisiveness
title_cn: 苹果公司押注首席执行官特努斯将恢复乔布斯时代的决断力
summary: When Apple announced Monday that longtime leader Tim Cook would be replaced by John Ternus, it published an image of the two executives walking side by side at the company’s campus in Cupertino, California. Both men are wearing Apple Watches, dark button-up shirts and blue jeans as they smile at each other — a near mirror image. The implication: Ternus, Apple’s hardware head, will bring continuity as chief executive officer and help preserve Cook’s legacy.  But Ternus will have a challenge when he officially takes the job in September. Even as he maintains Apple’s device empire — and its more than $400 billion in annual revenue — the executive will need to take chances, enter new product categories and find the company’s footing in artificial intelligence. Mark Gurman, Bloomberg News Managing Editor for Global Consumer Tech, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia-Backed Vast Data Raises $1 Billion, Triples Valuation to $30 Billion

summary: In the early days of April, a group of mid-level employees at Microsoft Corp. started making calls that would send tremors through the global market for carbon removals.

summary: Rogers Communications Inc. matched analysts’ earnings estimates and raised its 2026 outlook for free cash flow as it cuts capital spending. The shares rose.

title: Tesla Shares Need New ‘Razzle-Dazzle’ as EVs Slow, AI Hype Cools
title_cn: 随着电动汽车发展缓慢、人工智能炒作降温，特斯拉股价需要新的“炫目”
summary: Wall Street analysts expect Tesla Inc. to deliver a big jump in earnings when it reports Wednesday, something investors would have clamored for in the past.

summary: On the new season of Bloomberg Primer, see the frenzied contest in the US and elsewhere to catch up, and the new discoveries being made along the way.

title_cn: 中国360利用人工智能寻找软件缺陷，呼应神话
summary: A large Chinese cybersecurity firm is using artificial intelligence to identify security vulnerabilities in widely used software applications, positioning itself as a competitor to Anthropic PBC, according to a new report.

title_cn: 谷歌云推出新的人工智能芯片和构建代理的工具
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud division unveiled the latest generation of its tensor processing unit, or TPU, a homegrown chip that’s designed to make AI computing services faster and more efficient.

title: ‘Pokopia’ Flurry Helps Nintendo’s Switch 2 Top US Sales in March
title_cn: 《Pokopia》Furry 帮助任天堂 Switch 2 登上美国 3 月份销量榜首
summary: Nintendo Co.’s Switch 2 was the best-selling console in the US in March, riding a wave of popularity triggered by the release of surprise hit Pokémon Pokopia.

title: DeepSeek in Talks to Raise at $20 Billion Value, Information Says
title_cn: 消息称 DeepSeek 正在洽谈融资 200 亿美元
summary: Chinese technology giants Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. are in discussions to invest funds into DeepSeek that would value the artificial intelligence startup above $20 billion, according to The Information.

title: Bill Nye Calls NASA's Proposed Budget 'Slap in the Face'
title_cn: 比尔·奈称美国宇航局拟议的预算是“打脸”
summary: Bill Nye, also known as "The Science Guy," and The Planetary Society chief ambassador, calls the proposed budget for NASA a "slap in the face," especially after all that was accomplished with the Artemis II mission to the moon. Nye says 53 space missions could be cut due to drastic budget cuts. He spoke to Bloomberg The Close on Monday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Releases New AI Agents to Challenge OpenAI and Anthropic
title_cn: 谷歌发布新AI代理挑战OpenAI和Anthropic
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google unveiled a slew of tools to build AI agents aimed at helping companies automate tasks in the tech giant’s latest attempt to take on OpenAI and Anthropic PBC in the burgeoning market.

title: Dell’s XPS 16 Laptop Marks a Return to Form After PC Business Got ‘Off Course’
title_cn: 戴尔 XPS 16 笔记本电脑标志着 PC 业务“偏离正轨”后的回归
summary: It’s not unheard of for tech companies to reverse a big marketing decision, but few have done so as quickly as Dell Technologies Inc. In early 2025, the company announced it would move away from its long-running XPS laptop branding in favor of simpler naming schemes like “Pro” and “Max” intended to appeal to a broader market of consumers accustomed to Apple Inc.’s naming strategy. By the following January, Dell realized it had made a mistake and quickly pivoted back.

title: Google Launches $750 Million Fund for Consultants to Adopt AI
title_cn: 谷歌设立 7.5 亿美元基金，资助顾问采用人工智能
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud is launching a $750 million fund to help consulting firms including McKinsey & Co., Accenture Plc and Deloitte bring agentic artificial intelligence to their clients.

title: Deutsche Telekom Weighs Full Combination With T-Mobile
title_cn: 德国电信考虑与 T-Mobile 全面合并
summary: Deutsche Telekom AG is discussing a potential combination with its American arm T-Mobile US Inc., people familiar with the matter said, a move that would create the world’s biggest phone company and set a record for public M&A.

title: Vista Strikes Deal to Speed Up Google AI in Software Portfolio
title_cn: Vista 达成协议，加速 Google AI 在软件产品组合中的应用
summary: Vista Equity Partners is partnering with Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud to accelerate the deployment of artificial intelligence across the private equity firm’s portfolio of more than 90 software firms.

title: Chip Bonus Boom: How Korea Learned Everyone Cares About Other People’s Money
title_cn: 筹码红利热潮：韩国如何认识到每个人都关心别人的钱
summary: Samsung workers press chipmaker to follow SK Hynix example and share massive profits

title: EQT Chief Sees AI Rout as Opportunity for Fresh Tech Bets
title_cn: EQT 首席执行官将人工智能溃败视为新科技押注的机会
summary: The broad selloff in public markets triggered by fears of artificial intelligence disruption provides an opportunity to snap up technology firms on the cheap, according to private equity giant EQT AB.

title: OpenAI Poaches Airbnb Executive to Be First Director for EMEA
title_cn: OpenAI 挖来 Airbnb 高管担任欧洲、中东和非洲地区首任总监
summary: OpenAI has hired its first managing director to oversee operations in Europe, helping guide its expansion in a key market where there are mounting political concerns about being overly reliant on US artificial intelligence services.

title: Deutsche Telekom Weighs Full Combination with T-Mobile
title_cn: 德国电信考虑与 T-Mobile 全面合并
summary: Deutsche Telekom is considering a full combination with its American arm T-Mobile, a move that would create a multinational telecom group and rank as the largest-ever public M&A deal. Manuel Baigorri reports on the Bloomberg scoop. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Naspers Mulls Options for South Africa’s Historic ‘City Press’
title_cn: 纳斯珀斯正在考虑南非历史悠久的“城市出版社”的选择
summary: Naspers Ltd., Africa’s largest company by market value, is exploring strategic options for City Press, according to people familiar with the matter, a historic newspaper in the continent’s biggest economy.

title: AI Startup Has Helped Reverse Thousands of Denied Health Insurance Claims
title_cn: 人工智能初创公司已帮助扭转数千名被拒绝的健康保险索赔
summary: Americans rarely fight back when insurers reject treatments their doctors have prescribed. Claimable is working to change that, with a little help from Mark Cuban.

title: Japan Top Officials to Meet Banks to Discuss Mythos Threat
title_cn: 日本高级官员将与银行会面讨论神话威胁
summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said she will meet the country’s biggest banks to discuss Anthropic PBC’s latest AI model Mythos on Friday, as authorities around the world express concerns about the technology.

title: Americans Aren’t Buying Trump’s Economic Spin
title_cn: 美国人并不相信特朗普的经济政策
summary: President Trump’s struggle with affordability will define the midterm elections, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Nia-Malika Henderson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Could Own Up to 90% of Spirit as Part of $500 Million Rescue
title_cn: 作为 5 亿美元救援计划的一部分，美国可能拥有 Spirit 高达 90% 的股份
summary: The Trump administration is nearing a rescue package for Spirit Airlines that could give the US government the option to own as much as 90% of the carrier once it emerges from bankruptcy, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Peru’s Defense and Foreign Ministers Resign Over F-16 Controversy
title_cn: 秘鲁国防部长和外交部长因 F-16 争议辞职
summary: Peru’s defense and foreign affairs ministers resigned over interim President Jose Maria Balcázar’s decision to defer a major fighter-jet purchase to a new administration taking office later this year.

title: Trump Endorses Former Boxer for Stefanik Seat in Upstate NY
title_cn: 特朗普支持前拳击手担任纽约州北部的斯特凡尼克席位
summary: President Donald Trump gave his endorsement in the race to fill Elise Stefanik’s House seat in upstate New York to Anthony Constantino, giving a significant boost to the businessman and former boxer.

title: Germany Plans First Auction for New Gas Plants in September
title_cn: 德国计划于九月首次拍卖新天然气工厂
summary: Germany plans to start holding tenders from September to build new gas-fired power plants, a draft law seen by Bloomberg shows, a move that has come under pressure from the chancellor’s junior coalition partner.

title: Iran Menaces Hormuz as Its Own Oil Tankers Test US Blockade
title_cn: 伊朗油轮测试美国封锁，威胁霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Iranian gunboats fired on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday as Tehran maintained its grip on the vital energy channel, while two of its own oil supertankers tested a US blockade.

title: Why China’s Support for Iran Has Limits
title_cn: 为什么中国对伊朗的支持有限
summary: China is Iran’s most important economic partner, buying some 90% of its oil exports and providing a financial lifeline to the heavily sanctioned regime. But when US and Israeli strikes began to pummel Iran, Beijing showed little support for Tehran’s defense besides criticizing the attacks.

title: German Economy Chief Plans First Trip to China to Talk Trade
title_cn: 德国经济部长计划首次访华谈贸易
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is dispatching his economy minister to China next month as officials in Berlin grow increasingly concerned over a widening trade deficit, access to raw materials and regulation of artificial intelligence.

title: Bessent Says Many US Allies in Gulf Have Requested Swap Lines
title_cn: 贝森特表示，许多美国在海湾的盟友已请求互换额度
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says that many Persian Gulf allies along with a number of Asian nations have requested foreign exchange swap lines with the US. He speaks during testimony before the Senate Appropriations Subcommittee on President Donald Trump's 2027 budget request. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US and Iran Deadlocked Over Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce
title_cn: 特朗普延长休战期限后，美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡陷入僵局
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks, with both sides using blocks to the waterway to gain leverage during an extended ceasefire.

title: Pirro Says She Is Continuing to Probe Fed for Cost Overruns
title_cn: 皮罗表示她将继续调查美联储是否存在成本超支问题
summary: US Attorney Jeanine Pirro said she is continuing her controversial investigation into building-renovation cost overruns by the Federal Reserve.

title: London Mayor Khan Says it Would Be ‘Folly’ to Oust PM Starmer
title_cn: 伦敦市长汗表示，罢免首相斯塔默是“愚蠢的”
summary: London mayor Sadiq Khan said it would be a mistake to replace Keir Starmer this year, as pressure grows on the Prime Minister to resign over his handling of the Peter Mandelson fiasco.

title: Canada Picks Annette Ryan as Next Budget Watchdog
title_cn: 加拿大选择安妮特·瑞安（Annette Ryan）作为下一任预算监督机构
summary: Annette Ryan will become Canada’s fourth parliamentary budget officer, an independent watchdog of government finances, after parliament approved her appointment on Tuesday.

title: Romania Heads for Minority Government After Top Party Quits
title_cn: 罗马尼亚高层党退出后走向少数派政府
summary: Romania’s government is on track to lose its parliamentary majority after the biggest party in the four-member coalition signaled it’ll go into opposition, risking political instability and imperiling a drive to narrow the European Union’s widest budget deficit.

title: UK’s Revered, Once Discreet Civil Service Turns on Starmer
title_cn: 英国受人尊敬、曾经谨慎的公务员制度向斯塔默发起攻击
summary: The UK’s Labour government roared to power promising to improve morale in a civil service degraded by budget cuts under 14 years of Conservative rule. Instead, a public spat with some of its most senior officials is hurting its ability to navigate war with its enemies and disagreements with its friends.

title: Nuclear Energy Key for Italy National Security, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示，核能是意大利国家安全的关键
summary: Italy should generate nuclear power as a matter of national security, Italian Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti said.

title: Starmer Denies Pressuring UK Official Over Mandelson Role
title_cn: 斯塔默否认就曼德尔森的角色向英国官员施压
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer insisted his office didn’t pressure a senior Foreign Office official to rubber-stamp the appointment of Peter Mandelson as US ambassador, disputing a key part of the bureaucrat’s testimony to a parliamentary committee a day earlier.

title: Ukraine to Get €90 Billion EU Loan as Orban Heads for the Exit
title_cn: 欧尔班准备退出乌克兰将获得 900 亿欧元欧盟贷款
summary: Ukraine will finally start receiving a €90 billion ($106 billion) loan from the European Union after Hungary lifted its veto, bringing an end to years of Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s obstructionism over aid to a war-torn Kyiv.

title: NATO’s Rutte Urges Allies to Jointly Ramp Up Defense Production
title_cn: 北约吕特敦促盟国共同提高国防生产
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte urged allies to jointly ramp up defense-industry production to increase the alliance’s deterrence, adding that it will be a key subject at the July summit in Ankara.

title: Virginia Voters Approve Democratic Plan to Redraw Districts
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州选民批准民主党重划选区的计划
summary: Virginia voters backed a Democratic plan to redraw the state’s congressional districts in a way that could net them as many as four more US House seats in November’s midterm elections, according to multiple projections.

title: San Francisco Billionaire Punches Back Against ‘Overpaid’ CEO Tax
title_cn: 旧金山亿万富翁反击“多付”首席执行官税
summary: Chris Larsen wants businesses to get tough when unions propose ‘stupid, job-killing’ ideas. He’s putting his money where his mouth is.

title: Italy’s Giorgetti Says Deficit to Be Under EU Limit in 2026
title_cn: 意大利总理乔尔盖蒂称 2026 年赤字将低于欧盟限额
summary: Premier Giorgia Meloni’s government insisted Italy can still bring its deficit down to below the European Union’s ceiling this year, even if the economy performs worse than forecast.

title: Can the US and Iran Agree to a Lasting Deal to End the War?
title_cn: 美国和伊朗能否达成持久协议来结束战争？
summary: After President Donald Trump indefinitely extended a US ceasefire with Iran, the key question is whether the two sides can reach a deal to end a war that has killed thousands of people and sparked a global energy crunch.

title: Bulgaria’s Landslide Election Win Pushes Top Prosecutor to Quit
title_cn: 保加利亚压倒性选举胜利迫使最高检察官辞职
summary: Bulgaria’s acting chief prosecutor resigned two days after former president, Rumen Radev, scored the most decisive election win this century and pledged to root out graft.

title: Iran War to Impact Shipping Long After It Ends, Japan’s MOL Says
title_cn: 日本商船三井表示，伊朗战争在结束后很长时间内仍将影响航运业
summary: The impact of the Middle East conflict on the shipping industry and global supply chains will linger long after the war ends, according to the head of one of the world’s largest tanker owners.

title: Hyundai, ST Engineering Bid for $530 Million Thai Frigate Order
title_cn: 现代、ST Engineering 竞标价值 5.3 亿美元的泰国护卫舰订单
summary: South Korea’s Hyundai Heavy Industries Co. and Singapore’s ST Engineering Ltd. are among six companies vying for a $530 million contract to supply a high-capability frigate to Thailand, which is seeking to strengthen its maritime defenses.

title: Oil Trader CFOs Say Hormuz Closure Driving Wave of Disputes
title_cn: 石油贸易商首席财务官表示，霍尔木兹海峡关闭引发了一系列纠纷
summary: The chief financial officers of some of the world’s top commodity trading houses warned that the protracted closure of the Strait of Hormuz may lead to a wave of disputes stemming from lost supply.

title: Starmer’s Labour Set for ‘Historic Losses’ in London Local Vote
title_cn: 斯塔默的工党在伦敦地方投票中遭遇“历史性损失”
summary: Labour is set to hemorrhage votes to both the Greens on the left and Nigel Farage’s Reform UK on the right during local elections in London next month, according to a new poll that lays bare the flagging popularity of Keir Starmer’s governing party.

title: Turkey Says COP31 Climate Summit to Focus on Clean Energy Shift
title_cn: 土耳其表示 COP31 气候峰会将重点关注清洁能源转型
summary: Turkey will use its role as host of this year’s COP31 climate summit to boost clean energy adoption, according to the event’s incoming president, with the Iran war showing how important it is to diversify away from fossil fuels.
